title: Crypto platform Tothemoon secures MiCA licence in Cyprus
snippet: Tothemoon, a global crypto platform, today announced that it has secured authorisation from the Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission (CySEC) as a Crypto-Asset Service Provider (CASP) under the European Union’s Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA).

title: Robinhood Chain goes live on mainnet alongside 24/7 tokenized stocks, Lighter perps and planned crypto agentic trading
snippet: Robinhood Chain, a Layer 2 built using Arbitrum's tech stack, went live on public mainnet, with partners including Uniswap from day one.

title: Morphic launches RGLTD for digital assets
snippet: Morphic Financial Group, the London-based digital financial services group, today announces the launch of RGLTD and the expansion of its strategic partnership with Cashify, creating a new dual-brand operating structure designed to serve the evolving needs of Europe’s regulated digital asset market.
